001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.BatchDao;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Batch;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
007import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo.BatchWithEggGroups;
008import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo.BatchWithIncubator;
009import java.util.ArrayList;
010import java.util.List;
011import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
012import javax.inject.Inject;
013
014public class BatchRepositoryImpl implements BatchRepository {
015
016  private final BatchDao batchDao;
017  private final EggGroupRepository eggGroupRepository;
018  private final EggRepository eggRepository;
019
020  @Inject
021  BatchRepositoryImpl(
022      BatchDao batchDao,
023      EggGroupRepository eggGroupRepository,
024      EggRepository eggRepository
025  ) {
026    this.batchDao = batchDao;
027    this.eggGroupRepository = eggGroupRepository;
028    this.eggRepository = eggRepository;
029  }
030
031  @Override
032  public LiveData<List<Batch>> getAll() {
033    return batchDao.selectAll();
034  }
035
036  @Override
037  public LiveData<Batch> get(long id) {
038    return batchDao.select(id);
039  }
040
041  @Override
042  public LiveData<List<Batch>> getByIncubator(long incubatorId) {
043    return batchDao.selectByIncubator(incubatorId);
044  }
045
046  @Override
047  public LiveData<BatchWithEggGroups> getWithGroups(long id) {
048    return batchDao.selectWithGroups(id);
049  }
050
051  @Override
052  public LiveData<List<BatchWithEggGroups>> getAllWithGroups() {
053    return batchDao.selectAllWithGroups();
054  }
055
056  @Override
057  public LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> getAllWithIncubator() {
058    return batchDao.selectAllWithIncubator();
059  }
060
061  @Override
062  public LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> getAllWithIncubatorOrderByExpectedHatch() {
063    return batchDao.selectAllWithIncubatorOrderByExpectedHatch();
064  }
065
066  @Override
067  public LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> getAllWithIncubatorOrderByIncubator() {
068    return batchDao.selectAllWithIncubatorOrderByIncubator();
069  }
070
071  @Override
072  public LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> getAllWithIncubatorOrderByBatchNumber() {
073    return batchDao.selectAllWithIncubatorOrderByBatchNumber();
074  }
075
076  @Override
077  public CompletableFuture<Long> save(Batch batch) {
078    return CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> {
079      if (batch.getId() == 0L) {
080        long id = batchDao.insert(batch);
081        batch.setId(id);
082        return id;
083      } else {
084        batchDao.update(batch);
085        return batch.getId();
086      }
087    });
088  }
089
090  @Override
091  public CompletableFuture<Long> saveWithInitialEggGroups(Batch batch, String breed) {
092    return save(batch)
093        .thenCompose(batchId -> {
094          List<EggGroup> groups = buildInitialEggGroups(batchId, breed, batch.getNumEggsSet());
095          return eggGroupRepository.saveAll(groups)
096              .thenCompose(ids -> seedEggsForGroups(groups))
097              .thenApply(ignored -> batchId);
098        });
099  }
100
101  @Override
102  public CompletableFuture<Void> delete(Batch batch) {
103    return CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
104      batchDao.delete(batch);
105    });
106  }
107
108  private List<EggGroup> buildInitialEggGroups(long batchId, String breed, int eggCount) {
109    List<EggGroup> groups = new ArrayList<>();
110
111    EggGroup group = new EggGroup();
112    group.setBatchId(batchId);
113    group.setBreed(breed);
114    group.setInitialEggCount(eggCount);
115    group.setNotes(null);
116
117    groups.add(group);
118    return groups;
119  }
120
121  private CompletableFuture<Void> seedEggsForGroups(List<EggGroup> groups) {
122    CompletableFuture<Void> chain = CompletableFuture.completedFuture(null);
123
124    for (EggGroup group : groups) {
125      chain = chain.thenCompose(ignored ->
126          eggRepository.seedEggsForGroup(group.getId(), group.getInitialEggCount())
127      );
128    }
129
130    return chain;
131  }
132}
